design_policy.disease_specific_interpretation: Each disease node may assign its own likelihood to the same finding pattern.
design_policy.criteria_patterns: Criteria phenotype patterns may exist but should not force disease posterior to 1.0.

finding_patterns.label: Typical brief recurrent positional vertigo history
finding_patterns.rule: hx_recurrent_positional_vertigo == yes AND hx_positional_trigger == yes AND hx_brief_seconds_to_minutes == yes

finding_patterns.label: Typical posterior-canal BPPV positional nystagmus pattern
finding_patterns.rule: (dix_hallpike_performed == yes) AND (dh_torsional_upbeating_nystagmus == yes OR side_lying_test_positive == yes) AND dh_duration_less_than_60s != no

finding_patterns.label: Typical horizontal-canal geotropic BPPV pattern
finding_patterns.rule: supine_roll_test_performed == yes AND roll_test_horizontal_nystagmus == yes AND horizontal_geotropic_nystagmus == yes

finding_patterns.label: Typical horizontal-canal apogeotropic BPPV pattern
finding_patterns.rule: supine_roll_test_performed == yes AND roll_test_horizontal_nystagmus == yes AND horizontal_apogeotropic_nystagmus == yes

finding_patterns.label: Subjective BPPV pattern without visible canal-specific nystagmus
finding_patterns.rule: typical_positional_history == yes AND positional_vertigo_without_visible_nystagmus == yes

finding_patterns.label: Central positional nystagmus red-flag pattern
finding_patterns.rule: pure_downbeat_positional_nystagmus == yes OR pure_torsional_or_pure_vertical_positional_nystagmus == yes OR positional_nystagmus_persistent_gt_60s == yes OR positional_nystagmus_no_latency == yes OR positional_nystagmus_no_fatigability == yes

finding_patterns.label: MD-compatible recurrent spontaneous episodic vertigo core
finding_patterns.rule: hx_two_or_more_vertigo_episodes == yes AND hx_spontaneous_vertigo == yes AND hx_brief_seconds_to_minutes != yes AND orthostatic_trigger_or_syncope != yes

finding_patterns.label: MD definite duration pattern
finding_patterns.rule: hx_episode_duration_20min_to_12h == yes

finding_patterns.label: MD probable duration pattern
finding_patterns.rule: hx_episode_duration_20min_to_24h == yes OR hx_episode_duration_20min_to_12h == yes OR hx_recurrent_episodic_dizziness_without_clear_vertigo == yes

finding_patterns.label: Ipsilateral fluctuating aural symptom pattern
finding_patterns.rule: (hx_fluctuating_hearing_loss == yes OR hx_tinnitus_affected_ear == yes OR hx_aural_fullness_affected_ear == yes) AND affected_ear_laterality in {left,right} AND hx_aural_symptom_temporal_relation_to_vertigo != no

finding_patterns.label: Audiometric low- to mid-frequency SNHL pattern in the affected ear
finding_patterns.rule: audiometry_performed == yes AND audiometry_low_mid_freq_snhl_affected_ear == yes

finding_patterns.label: MD-compatible auditory-episodic syndrome
finding_patterns.rule: md_episodic_vertigo_core == yes AND md_probable_duration_pattern == yes AND md_fluctuating_aural_symptom_pattern == yes

finding_patterns.label: Definite-MD phenotype pattern before posterior audit
finding_patterns.rule: md_episodic_vertigo_core == yes AND md_definite_duration_pattern == yes AND md_fluctuating_aural_symptom_pattern == yes AND md_audiometric_low_mid_snhl_pattern == yes
finding_patterns.notes: Phenotype pattern for criteria audit; not used as primary posterior evidence by default.

finding_patterns.label: Probable-MD phenotype pattern before posterior audit
finding_patterns.rule: md_episodic_vertigo_core == yes AND md_probable_duration_pattern == yes AND md_fluctuating_aural_symptom_pattern == yes
finding_patterns.notes: Phenotype pattern for criteria audit; not used as primary posterior evidence by default.

finding_patterns.label: Auditory-only fluctuating low-frequency SNHL pattern
finding_patterns.rule: md_fluctuating_aural_symptom_pattern == yes AND md_audiometric_low_mid_snhl_pattern == yes AND md_episodic_vertigo_core != yes

finding_patterns.label: Recurrent low-tone SNHL pattern
finding_patterns.rule: audiometry_low_mid_freq_snhl_affected_ear == yes AND audiometry_fluctuating_thresholds == yes AND md_episodic_vertigo_core != yes

finding_patterns.label: Caloric-vHIT dissociation supportive pattern
finding_patterns.rule: vhit_caloric_dissociation_md_like == yes OR (caloric_unilateral_weakness == yes AND vhit_normal_or_preserved == yes)

finding_patterns.label: Composite supportive MD hydrops/lab/imaging pattern
finding_patterns.rule: caloric_vhit_dissociation_pattern == yes OR vemp_abnormality == yes OR ecochg_abnormality == yes OR delayed_gad_mri_eh_ple == yes

finding_patterns.label: Central neurologic or vascular red-flag pattern
finding_patterns.rule: focal_neurologic_or_cerebellar_signs == yes OR new_severe_headache_or_neck_pain == yes OR severe_truncal_ataxia_or_unable_to_stand == yes OR vascular_risk_or_crescendo_attacks == yes

finding_patterns.label: CPA/IAC or retrocochlear concern pattern
finding_patterns.rule: mri_iac_cpa_retrocochlear_lesion == yes OR audiometry_asymmetric_snhl == yes

levels.rule: dh_torsional_upbeating_nystagmus == yes AND hx_positional_trigger == yes AND dh_duration_less_than_60s == yes AND (dh_latency_present == yes OR dh_fatigability_present == yes OR dh_reversal_on_sitting == yes)

dh_torsional_upbeating_nystagmus == yes AND (hx_positional_trigger == yes OR dh_duration_less_than_60s == yes OR dh_latency_present == yes OR dh_fatigability_present == yes OR dh_reversal_on_sitting == yes OR side_lying_test_positive == yes)
